title: 2 Bedroom Flat – Oke Ogbo
description: Spacious 2-bedroom flat located in a peaceful estate in Oke Ogbo. Features a well-sized sitting room, modern kitchen fittings, and constant electricity via a community prepaid meter.

reviews.name: Tunde B.
reviews.text: Spacious rooms and great natural lighting. The compound is clean and well managed.

reviews.name: Aisha M.
reviews.text: Security and peace of mind is exactly what I was looking for. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Chinedu O.
reviews.text: Living here has been a breeze. Maintenance is top-notch!
